overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval cemetery at night. The character approaches a stone archway entrance, walks past gravestones on a cobblestone path, and enters a torch-lit tunnel guarded by two soldiers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a stone archway entrance to the cemetery

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with scattered grass patches
large stone archway marking the cemetery entrance with weathered columns
medieval stone buildings with red tiled roofs visible in the distance
tall cypress trees silhouetted against the night sky
low shrubs lining the sides of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt path at night toward a stone archway entrance to a cemetery. Trees and bushes line the path while village buildings are visible in the distance against a dark blue starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cemetery with gravestones and stone walls

events.description: passes through the stone archway from dirt path into the cobblestone cemetery
warm orange torchlight from the tunnel entrance becomes visible ahead against the blue darkness

agents.ego_description: walking through the cemetery past rows of weathered gravestones toward a lit tunnel entrance

entered.detail: irregular stone paving stones forming the cemetery walkway
tall stone walls enclosing the cemetery grounds
weathered stone tombstones and mausoleums of various sizes
arched stone tunnel entrance with glowing warm light from within

segments.scene_description: Having entered the cemetery through the archway, the character walks along a winding cobblestone path between weathered gravestones and stone walls. The path leads toward a distant tunnel entrance illuminated by warm torchlight, creating a contrast with the cool moonlit surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: guarded tunnel entrance with stone walls and wall sconces

events.description: approaches the torch-lit tunnel entrance with two guards standing watch
passes between two guards and enters the narrow stone tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking into the tunnel entrance passing between two guards standing at attention

notable_agents.action: guard standing with sword drawn at the tunnel entrance
guard standing with sword drawn at the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the tunnel passage
burning torches mounted on the tunnel walls casting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: Approaching the tunnel entrance illuminated by warm wall sconces, the character passes between two armed guards standing watch at the stone archway. The scene transitions from the open cemetery into the narrow enclosed tunnel, leaving the night sky behind as the character enters the torch-lit passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet rural path into the oppressive enclosure of a torch-lit tunnel. It begins by following the character along a dirt path lined with trees and bushes, moving toward a stone archway under a dark blue starry sky with distant village buildings. As the camera passes through the archway, the terrain shifts to a winding cobblestone path that weaves between weathered gravestones and stone walls under cool moonlight. The scene then draws closer to a distant glow, transitioning from the open cemetery toward a tunnel entrance illuminated by warm wall sconces. Finally, the camera passes between two armed guards and enters the narrow stone passage, leaving the night sky behind as the environment closes in around the torch-lit interior.
